findings.detail: POSシステム definition in table (entity p153::4 row[2]) and term (entity p153::3) use slightly different ZH/EN wording (semantically equivalent). ZH: '商品销售时' vs '当商品售出时'; EN: 'A system...utilizes' vs 'A mechanism...uses'. No meaning loss but inconsistency across entity types.

Pages 158-161 all have leaf_count=0, entities=[], polish_items_ref=None, stage6_verdict=PASS. Consecutive empty range between populated pages (157 has 4 entities, 162 has 4 entities). Possibly index/answer/blank pages, but no page-type metadata to confirm. Cannot verify whether content was silently dropped or pages are legitimately empty.

POSシステム definition: JP ends with 'い' (多い - natural JP sentence ending without 。), EN ends with 'system' (no period). ZH ends correctly with '）'. Not truncation - original source likely omits terminal punctuation. Low risk.

All 14 question answer_index values verified correct: Hackathon (ウ), Roadmap (エ/time-axis), NFC/IC-card (エ), NLP=a,b,c (ア), Deep-Learning (エ/neural), GenAI+E-R (ウ), Hallucination (エ), Human-centric-b-only (ウ), Darwin-Sea (イ), AI/ML sales forecast (ウ), Activation-func (エ), Neural-Network (ウ), AI chatbot (ア), GPS 3-satellites (ウ).
Glossary surface translations match page entity surfaces for all 4 terms checked: ハルシネーション, 人間中心のAI社会原則, トレーサビリティ, POSシステム. No glossary-page divergence on surface strings.

All 7 principles of 人間中心のAI社会原則 present (8 rows = 1 header + 7 data). Principles verified in JP/ZH/EN: (1)Human-Centricity, (2)Education&Literacy, (3)Privacy, (4)Security, (5)Fair Competition, (6)Fairness/Accountability/Transparency, (7)Innovation. Official 2019 Cabinet Office document content accurately reproduced.

Full scan of all text fields across 22 entities and 10 pages. No replacement characters (U+FFFD), no mojibake, no surrogate pairs. Earlier terminal rendering artifact '哪���项' confirmed as display issue only - underlying JSON char is correct U+54EA U+4E00 U+9879.
